title: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz: I wouldn’t advise my kids to live or study in US
summary_full: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz advised his children against studying or working in the US due to a rapidly changing social climate and job market difficulties for the highly educated. Merz expressed strong optimism about Germany's opportunities for young people, contrasting it with his concerns about the current US situation.
